description: You are an experimental psychologist at an anxiety research lab. Using PsychoPy Coder, write a complete Python script for a differential fear conditioning experiment using an adaptive US intensity staircase as validated by Lonsdorf et al. (2017). The script must implement a habituation phase with 10 trials of counterbalanced CS+ and CS- colored squares (via participant number modulo 2), an acquisition phase where the CS+ is paired with a white noise US, and a PsychoPy data.StairHandler (startVal=0.8, stepSizes=[0.1, 0.05], nReversals=4, stepType='lin') to adjust US amplitude based on participant ratings. Include a visual rating scale for US aversiveness after each US delivery and ensure CS duration is 4s with US onset at 3.5s. The script must import core, visual, data, and event from psychopy and use ExperimentHandler to save data to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/data/. Save the script to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/fear_conditioning.py. Login: user ga, password password123
